title: CodeTune Logging System Implementation
description: Complete implementation of organized logging system to replace console spam with structured, colored logs

features: INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG log levels

features: Color-coded log levels (Blue=INFO, Orange=WARN, Red=ERROR, Green=SUCCESS)

tasks.title: Add Logger imports to extension files
tasks.description: Import Logger class in extension TypeScript files

tasks.title: Replace console.log calls in extension
tasks.description: Convert all console.log/error/warn calls to Logger methods
tasks.details: Converted ~15 console calls to structured logging

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript compilation errors
tasks.description: Resolve Logger method signature mismatches in activityBarView.ts
tasks.details: Fixed 5 TypeScript errors by converting multiple arguments to data objects

tasks.title: Add Logger imports to component files
tasks.description: Import logger in all UI component JavaScript files

tasks.title: Replace console calls in components
tasks.description: Convert console.log/error/warn to logger methods in UI components
tasks.details: Converted 100+ console calls to structured logging across all UI files

tasks.title: Convert repetitive logs to debug level
tasks.description: Change frequently called logs (timeupdate, counters) to debug level

Separated extension logs to VS Code Output Channel

Improved debugging experience with structured log data

Add retry mechanisms for failed operations

ui_sandboxing_fixes.title: Webview Sandboxing Fixes
ui_sandboxing_fixes.description: Fix browser API restrictions in sandboxed webview environment

tasks.title: Replace Browser confirm() with VS Code Dialog
tasks.description: Replace browser confirm() dialog with VS Code extension dialog to work within sandbox
tasks.problem: Browser confirm() blocked by webview sandboxing ('allow-modals' not set)
solution: Add confirmResetStats() method for actual reset execution
Use VS Code native confirmation dialogs

tasks.title: Fix Statistics Icon Click Event Listeners
tasks.description: Fix statistics mode toggle icon not being clickable due to HTML replacement removing listeners
tasks.problem: updateListeningStatsDisplay() replaced HTML, removing attached event listeners
solution: Separate global event listeners from dynamic element listeners
Create attachEventListeners() method called after HTML updates
Use proper event listener cleanup to avoid duplicates
Bind event handlers to component instance

localization_timing_fix.title: Fix Localization Loading Timing
localization_timing_fix.description: Fix localization data not loading properly due to timing issues
localization_timing_fix.problem: Localization data sent immediately after HTML set, before webview ready
solution: Add 1-second delay before sending localization data
Ensure webview is fully initialized before message transmission
Fix statistics component showing raw keys instead of translated text

tasks.title: Fix Script Loading Order
tasks.description: Ensure activityBar.js loads first to define window.vscode before other components
tasks.changes: Moved {{jsUri}} (activityBar.js) to top of script loading order

recent_benefits: Completed full localization support for 5 languages
Fixed critical language selector UI bug
Resolved VS Code API access issues across all components
Ensured proper script loading order for dependency management
Eliminated console errors when changing languages
Made extension fully functional with proper theming

hijri_date_fix.title: Fix Hijri Date Calculation Accuracy
hijri_date_fix.description: Replace mathematical approximation with accurate Intl.DateTimeFormat API
changes: Added adjustment parameter for manual corrections if needed
Uses Umm al-Qura calendar (official Saudi/standard Islamic calendar)
Eliminates 2-day offset that was showing '1 Sha'ban' instead of '28 Rajab'
benefits: Accurate Hijri dates matching official Islamic calendars
Future-proof implementation using built-in JavaScript APIs
Supports manual adjustment for local moon sighting variations

hijri_date_communication_fix.title: Fix Hijri Date Display in Webview Components
hijri_date_communication_fix.description: Implement proper communication between webview and extension for accurate Hijri date display
hijri_date_communication_fix.problem_identified: prayerTracker.js was using its own simplified calculation instead of the accurate IslamicCalendar.ts

extension_side: Handler calls IslamicCalendar.getHijriDateString() using Umm al-Qura calendar
Returns accurate Hijri date string to webview
webview_side: Added 'receiveHijriDate' message handler to update display
Modified updateIslamicInfo() to request fresh dates instead of calculating locally
Added initial Hijri date request in constructor

communication_flow: Extension: activityBarView receives message → calls IslamicCalendar.getHijriDateString()
Extension: sends 'receiveHijriDate' message with accurate date string
Webview: prayerTracker receives message → updates UI display
benefits: Ensures consistent Hijri dates across all components
Uses authoritative Umm al-Qura calendar system
Proper separation of concerns between webview and extension
Future-proof architecture for other date-related features
hijri_date_communication_fix.testing: Verified correct date display: January 17, 2026 shows '28 Rajab 1447 AH' instead of incorrect '1 Sha'ban 1447 AH'

salawat_text_arabic_improvement.title: Improve Salawat Counter Arabic Text with Proper Diacritics
salawat_text_arabic_improvement.description: Update Arabic localization to use more eloquent and properly diacritized Salawat text
salawat_text_arabic_improvement.problem_identified: Salawat section used basic text 'صَلَوَات - صلوات' without proper Islamic eloquence

solution_implemented.text_change: Changed from 'صَلَوَات - صلوات' to 'صَلّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّد' with full diacritics
solution_implemented.cultural_appropriateness: Uses proper Islamic terminology and Arabic calligraphy standards

benefits: More eloquent and culturally appropriate Arabic text
Proper diacritics for better readability and authenticity
Enhanced user experience for Arabic-speaking users
salawat_text_arabic_improvement.testing: Verified Arabic text displays correctly with proper diacritics: 'صَلّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّد'

friday_surah_smart_visibility.title: Implement Smart Visibility for Friday Surah Al-Kahf Section
friday_surah_smart_visibility.description: Add intelligent time-based visibility system to show Friday Surah section only when relevant
friday_surah_smart_visibility.ux_problem_identified: Friday Surah section was always visible, creating visual noise and taking up space unnecessarily during non-Friday days

visibility_logic.thursday_after_sunset: Show Thursday after 5:45 PM (approximate Maghrib time)
visibility_logic.hidden_otherwise: Hide Saturday-Wednesday and Thursday before sunset

technical_implementation: Added shouldShowFridaySurah() method with precise time calculations
Added updateFridaySurahVisibility() for dynamic show/hide control
Added periodic visibility checks every minute
Added CSS class '.hidden-section' for clean hiding
solution_implemented.communication_flow: Automatic time-based visibility without user interaction

ux_benefits: Eliminates visual noise and screen clutter during non-Friday days
Creates 'notification effect' - sudden appearance grabs attention
Better screen real estate management for daily users
Contextually relevant - only shows when it matters
Reduces cognitive load by hiding irrelevant information
Follows Islamic timing (Thursday sunset to Friday end)
friday_surah_smart_visibility.testing: Verified section appears Thursday after sunset and Friday, hidden other days

prayer_goals_daily_reset.title: Implement Daily Reset for Islamic Goals (Prayer Tracking)
prayer_goals_daily_reset.description: Add intelligent date-based reset system for prayer goals to provide daily fresh start
prayer_goals_daily_reset.problem_identified: Prayer goals persisted forever causing UX confusion - users couldn't distinguish yesterday's completed prayers from today's

date_aware_storage.data_structure: { date: 'Sat Jan 17 2026', goals: { fajr: false, dhuhr: false, ... } }
date_aware_storage.date_comparison: Compare stored date with current date on load

smart_reset_logic: On app load, check if stored date matches today
If same date: load saved goals
If different/new date: reset all goals to false
Always save with current date when goals are updated
solution_implemented.migration_safe: Uses new storage key to avoid conflicts with old data

benefits: Daily fresh start for prayer tracking
Eliminates confusion between yesterday and today's prayers
Matches Islamic daily prayer cycle expectations
Improves user experience with intuitive daily reset
prayer_goals_daily_reset.testing: Verified goals reset automatically when date changes, preserving same-day progress
